summary: Iteration 62 - Wealth Command v6.1.0 Revenue Layer + FX Trading Integration Complete Testing. All 62 backend tests passed (100%). Revenue Layer (AUM fees, trading fees, subscriptions, invoicing) and FX Trading (MT5/cTrader, currency pairs, hedging) fully operational in DEMO MODE.
critical_code_review_comments: All v6.1.0 Revenue Layer and FX Trading endpoints working correctly
Health check returns v6.1.0 with fx_trading in execution_layer and revenue_layer object
Revenue Layer: 4 fee schedules (standard_aum, premium_aum, trading_commission, performance_fee)
Revenue Layer: 3 subscription plans (starter $99/mo, professional $299/mo, enterprise $999/mo)
Revenue Layer: Tiered AUM fee calculation working correctly (verified $1M = $11,250 annual)
Revenue Layer: Invoice generation with GST (10%) working correctly
Revenue Layer: Revenue report with client segments (high_value, core, emerging)
FX Trading: 15 currency pairs (7 major, 5 cross, 3 exotic)
FX Trading: MT5 and cTrader platforms available in demo mode
FX Trading: Order execution, exposure analysis, and hedge preview working
FX Trading: Market hours with 4 sessions (Sydney, Tokyo, London, New York)
seed_data_creation: Used existing demo data. Revenue Layer has 3 clients (Wheeler Family, Chen Investment Trust, Patel Holdings). FX Trading has 2 demo accounts (demo_mt5, demo_ctrader).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 62 completed v6.1.0 Revenue Layer + FX Trading testing. All endpoints verified: Revenue Layer (status, fee-schedules, subscription-plans, calculate-fee, calculate-trading-fee, client fees, invoice generation, revenue-report) and FX Trading (status, pairs, accounts, order, orders, exposure, hedge-preview, market-hours). All trading is in DEMO MODE - MT5/cTrader not connected (no API keys).

mocked_apis.FX_Trading_MT5: MOCKED - Demo mode (no MT5_SERVER, MT5_LOGIN, MT5_PASSWORD configured)
mocked_apis.FX_Trading_cTrader: MOCKED - Demo mode (no CTRADER_CLIENT_ID, CTRADER_SECRET configured)
mocked_apis.Alpaca_Trading: MOCKED - Demo mode (no API keys configured)
